content: Linux case-sensitivity is the core Proton modding hazard: Windows/NTFS case-insensitive, ext4/btrfs case-sensitive. Bethesda games + mods reference files in mixed case; on Linux lookups fail. Mitigations: ext4 casefold (+F) attribute on chosen dirs (also speeds Wine path lookups), or normalize/case-fold at deploy time. Hardlinks require same filesystem (game install on steamapps/common may differ from staging) and cannot link directories. Symlinks cross-fs and Wine resolves them, but some games/anti-tamper dislike them and they add resolution overhead. Deploy engine must handle case mapping + same-fs detection.
